x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CI association enables Now Assist to traverse CMDB relationships and calculate infrastructure blast radius for each change -- the foundation of AI-driven change risk analysis.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Make cmdb_ci mandatory at change creation via UI policy. Target: 80%+ of change requests with CI association in the trailing 12 months. CI association enables Now Assist to calculate infrastructure blast radius for each change.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c29
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[CI association enables Now Assist to traverse CMDB relationships and calculate infrastructure blast radius for each change -- the foundation of AI-driven change risk analysis.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Change-to-CI Association Rate</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('change_request');
    gaTotal.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No change requests in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No change requests found in the last 12 months. CI association rate cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaMissing = new GlideAggregate('change_request');
    gaMissing.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaMissing.addQuery('cmdb_ci', '');
    gaMissing.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaMissing.query();
    var missing = gaMissing.next() ? parseInt(gaMissing.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var withCI = total - missing;
    var pct = Math.round((withCI / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of change requests have CI associated (last 12 months, ' + withCI + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 80) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of recent change requests are linked to a CI. Now Assist can calculate infrastructure blast radius for AI change risk assessment.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of change requests have a CI linked (target: 80%). Now Assist change risk assessment will have incomplete blast radius analysis for unlinked changes.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of change requests have a CI linked. Now Assist cannot calculate infrastructure blast radius without CI association — change risk AI assessment will be severely limited.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITSM</module>
<number>CHK0005968</number>
<order>290</order>
<remediation_guidance>Make cmdb_ci mandatory at change creation via UI policy. Target: 80%+ of change requests with CI association in the trailing 12 months. CI association enables Now Assist to calculate infrastructure blast radius for each change.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c29</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
